search_records.query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.searched_query: site:lastz.fandom.com Last Z heroes research events
search_records.search_notes: Focused on direct Fandom wiki pages relevant to heroes, research, and events. Included a daily event page plus research-building pages for cross-validation. No generic or off-topic pages were kept.

search_records.search_notes: Restricted to mmediamreza.com only. Prioritized exact Last Z guide pages and the game hub. Ignored generic home and unrelated alliance pages. Did not treat any single result as proof for mechanics or rewards.

results.title: Last Z Survival Shooter Hub: News, Guides & Event Strategies
